NotificationS  by  government

II-2 Ex. (218)
        
      RURAL DEVELOPMENT AND PANCHAYAT RAJ DEPARTMENT
RESERVATION OF SEATS IN DISTRICT PANCHAYAT WARDS UNDER THE  
TAMIL NADU PANCHAYATS ACT, 1994.
[G.O. (Ms) No. 57, Rural Development and Panchayat Raj (PR-1), 20th May 2019,  
¬õè£C 6, Mè£K, F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´-2050.]
No. II(2)/RDPR/341(h-1)/2019.
Under section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Panchayats Act, 1994 (Tamil Nadu Act 21 of 1994) 
and in supersession of the Rural Development and Panchayat Raj Department Notification 
No.II(2)/RDPR/640(b-1)/2016, published at pages 1 to 191 of Part II—Section 2 of the Tamil Nadu 
Government Gazette, Extraordinary, dated the 16th September 2016, the Governor of Tamil Nadu 
hereby reserves the seats for the persons belonging to the Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes and 
Women in the District Panchayats as specified in theTable below:-

Tamil  nadu  government  gazette  extraordinary	
251
           
reservation of seats of wards of panchayat union councils under the 
tamil nadu panchayats act, 1994.
[G.O. (Ms) No. 58, Rural Development and Panchayat Raj (PR-1), 20th May 2019,  
¬õè£C 6, Mè£K, F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´-2050.]
No. II(2)/RDPR/341(h-2)/2019.
Under section 20 of the Tamil Nadu Panchayats Act, 1994 (Tamil Nadu Act 21 of 1994) 
and in supersession of the Rural Development and Panchayat Raj Department Notification 
No.II(2)/RDPR/640(b-2)/2016, published at pages 192 to 439 of Part II–Section 2 of the Tamil Nadu 
Government Gazette, Extraordinary, dated the 16th September 2016, the Governor of Tamil Nadu 
hereby reserves the seats for the persons belonging to the Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes and 
Women in  the Panchayat Union Councils as specified in the Table below:-
